name: flow/flow-minimap
description: A scaled SVG overview of the graph with a draggable viewport rectangle.

meta.name: FlowMiniMap
meta.description: A scaled SVG overview of the graph with a draggable viewport rectangle.

props.name: viewport
props.description: The current pan/zoom viewport to reflect in the minimap.

props.name: containerWidth
props.description: Width of the flow container, used to scale the minimap.

props.name: containerHeight
props.description: Height of the flow container, used to scale the minimap.

props.name: onViewportChange
props.description: Called with the new viewport when the minimap is dragged.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Graph overview

whenToUse: Orienting users in a large graph
Letting users jump around by dragging the view rect
whenNotToUse: Tiny graphs that fit on screen
intent.a11yRationale: role="img" with an i18n-defaulted label describing the overview.
